title: stylidium laricifolium
intro: Stylidium laricifolium, also known as the mountain trigger plant, is a species of plant in the Stylidium genus, native to Western Australia. The mountain trigger plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water for its medicinal and herbal purposes.
